package.title: TRAGUIN Premium Assam Honeymoon Package — Romantic Wilderness: Guwahati • Kaziranga National Park

highlights.text: Serial code AS-006 | TRAGUIN tour code TG-AS-HM-006
State / Country: Assam, India | Category: Honeymoon & Romantic Escapes
Destinations Covered: Guwahati • Kaziranga National Park
Ideal for: Newlyweds, Couples Seeking Serenity
Vehicle: Premium Luxury AC Sedan / Executive Cruiser | Meal Plan: Royal CP/MAP with private dinners
Route Plan: Guwahati ➔ Romantic Cruise ➔ Kaziranga (3N) ➔ Guwahati (1N) ➔ Departure
TRAGUIN Signature Experience: Private twilight boat excursions and candlelight dinners in isolated nature locations.
Curated by TRAGUIN Experts: Every resort selected for privacy and exceptional hospitality.
Personalized Assistance: Dedicated 24/7 coordinator for dinner reservations and safari adjustments.
Shopping: Muga and Eri silks, single-estate orthodox teas, Diphlu River couple photography spots.
Important Notes: Safari subject to weather; book lodges 45-60 days ahead; respectful dress at Kamakhya.

itinerary.title: TRAGUIN Premium Assam Honeymoon Package — Romantic Wilderness: Guwahati • Kaziranga National Park
itinerary.tagline: Assam Honeymoon • Guwahati • Kaziranga • 04 Nights / 05 Days
itinerary.overview:
Surrender to misty morning horizons, gold-tinted tea estates, and the gentle whisper of the Brahmaputra in this signature romantic escape.

TOUR OVERVIEW\nCouples-only retreat curated by TRAGUIN: Guwahati ➔ Romantic Cruise ➔ Kaziranga (3 Nights) ➔ Guwahati (1 Night) ➔ Departure with sparkling wine welcome.

THE ALLURE OF ASSAM\nKaziranga UNESCO backdrop, Kamakhya spiritual bond, tea estate couple photos, and private candlelight dinners in colonial bungalows.
itinerary.seo_title: AS-006 | Assam Honeymoon Kaziranga Guwahati | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 04 Nights / 05 Days Assam honeymoon (AS-006 / TG-AS-HM-006): Brahmaputra cruise, Kaziranga safaris, Kamakhya VIP, 4-tier luxury lodges.

highlights.text: Brahmaputra sunset cruise on romantic arrival Day 01
Scenic drive to Kaziranga with tea garden trails Day 02
Dawn and afternoon safaris plus Orchid Conservatory Day 03
Kamakhya VIP and Umananda Island on Day 04
Departure with everlasting romantic memories Day 05

days.title: GUWAHATI ARRIVAL | ROMANTIC CRUISE ON THE MIGHTY BRAHMAPUTRA
days.description: Premium red-carpet welcome at Guwahati airport. Late afternoon exclusive sunset cruise with fine wine and live traditional music as the sun paints the sky gold and magenta.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Brahmaputra Sunset Cruise, Riverside Promenade.
Evening Experience: Candlelit dinner reservation over the water.
Overnight Stay: Luxury Hotel in Guwahati.
Meals Included: Welcome Drinks & Gourmet Dinner.

days.title: GUWAHATI TO KAZIRANGA | JOURNEY INTO THE WILD EMERALD HEARTLAND
days.description: Scenic drive through paddy fields and tea gardens to premium wilderness resort. Afternoon tea plantation walk and evening private bonfire beneath the stars.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Scenic Highway Vista, Tea Garden Trails.
Local Experiences: Private tea leaves plucking experience & local estate walk.
Overnight Stay: Premium Wilderness Resort, Kaziranga.
Meals Included: Breakfast & Traditional Assamese Dinner.

days.title: KAZIRANGA NATIONAL PARK | DAWN SAFARI & INTIMATE ORCHID CONSERVATORY VISIT
days.description: Early morning Central Range safari spotting One-Horned Rhinoceros. Orchid and Cultural Park visit and Western Range sunset jeep safari.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Morning & Afternoon Safaris, Orchid Conservatory.
Photography Points: Kohora Range panoramic sunset deck.
Overnight Stay: Premium Wilderness Resort, Kaziranga.
Meals Included: Full Board (Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner).

days.title: KAZIRANGA TO GUWAHATI | SACRED BLESSINGS & SIGHTSEEING
days.description: Return to Guwahati for VIP Kamakhya Temple, Umananda river island boat ride, and silk souvenir browsing with farewell romantic dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Kamakhya Temple, Umananda River Island, Fancy Bazar.
Evening Experience: Farewell romantic culinary dinner setup.
Overnight Stay: Luxury Hotel in Guwahati.

days.title: DEPARTURE | EVERLASTING MEMORIES OF ROMANTIC ASSAM
days.description: Peaceful breakfast in bed and executive airport transfer concluding your TRAGUIN romantic escape.
activities: Optional Activities: Packing premium tea samplers at local boutiques.

inclusions.text: Premium Accommodations: 04 Nights at elite handpicked hotels and luxury wilderness lodges.
Luxury Transfers: Private air-conditioned premium vehicle throughout, including toll fees and driver allowances.
Gourmet Meal Plan: Daily elaborate breakfasts and dynamic multi-course dinners.
Exclusive Experiences: Private romantic sunset cruise on the Brahmaputra River and fast-track VIP entry at Kamakhya Temple.
Jungle Adventures: Authorized open-jeep safari permits and park entry passes for Kaziranga National Park.
Welcome Amenities: Complementary honeymoon cake, traditional welcoming stoles, and daily premium mineral water.
TRAGUIN Support & Assistance: Continuous on-ground support and specialized local coordinators.
Air / Rail Fare: Domestic or international flight tickets to and from Guwahati.
Personal Expenses: Laundry services, direct dial telephone calls, or premium alcoholic beverages.
Camera & Guide Fees: Professional video camera permits or individual local monument guide fees.
Optional Tours: Any extra leisure excursions or activities not specified in the day-by-day itinerary.
Insurance Cover: Medical or comprehensive travel insurance plans.
